rationale: Acting on Review 1 removes the no-op includeRight_apply (literally rfl on a defeq wrapper, whose LHS never reduces usefully) and the three redundant map_* lemmas (each justified in the diff as special cases of Mathlib @[simp] lemmas that fire after unfolding map/BialgHom.id), yielding a smaller, non-duplicative public @[simp] surface for the api-design rubric; Review 2's approve leaves these bloat/misannotation problems untouched.
